GlobalPolicy.module-level-focus: Fast deterministic unit checks for each module.
GlobalPolicy.wave-level-focus: Integration checks across pipeline stages with synthetic videos.
GlobalPolicy.phase-level-focus: Synthetic video end-to-end tests with metric assertions.
GlobalPolicy.gui-testing-focus: Headless-compatible smoke tests (QT_QPA_PLATFORM=offscreen). Worker signal tests with QSignalSpy. Widget rendering tests limited by CI constraints.
GlobalPolicy.redaction: Never log secrets, credentials, or raw high-risk payloads.

VF-001.NAME: DetectHappyPath
VF-001.scenario: User provides valid MP4 + SRT — pipeline produces slides.json + images with correct intervals.
VF-001.expected-outcome: slides.json validates, slide images saved, transcript aligned.

VF-002.NAME: ExportMDPath
VF-002.scenario: Valid slides.json → deck.md with correct Marp formatting.

VF-003.NAME: GPUAutoFallback
VF-003.scenario: System without CUDA — auto backend falls back to OpenCV with warning.
VF-003.expected-outcome: Pipeline completes on CPU with WARNING log line.

VF-004.NAME: ExportPptxPath
VF-004.scenario: Valid slides.json + images → deck.pptx with full-slide pictures and speaker notes.
VF-004.expected-outcome: deck.pptx has correct slide count, notes contain cleaned transcript, images embedded.

VF-005.NAME: NotesProcessingPath
VF-005.scenario: Segment with SRT cues → process_notes(basic) → clean speaker notes text.
VF-005.expected-outcome: Raw subtitle fragments joined, punctuated, deduplicated into flowing text.

VF-006.NAME: DetectSlidesNoSubtitles
VF-006.scenario: User runs detect-slides with only a video — no subtitles.
VF-006.expected-outcome: slides.json produced with intervals and representative timestamps. Transcript fields may be empty. No error.

VF-007.NAME: NotesPostProcess
VF-007.scenario: User runs detect first, then later runs notes with different subtitles/notes-mode. No video re-decode.
VF-007.expected-outcome: Notes command loads existing slides.json, aligns new subtitles, generates notes, saves. Runs in seconds, not minutes.

VF-008.NAME: RoiToolVisualSelect
VF-008.scenario: User runs roi-tool with a video, drags a rectangle, presses Enter.
VF-008.expected-outcome: Coordinates printed to stdout in format x1,y1,x2,y2. Window closes cleanly.

VF-009.NAME: ProjectCreateOpen
VF-009.scenario: User creates project with video + subtitles, then opens it.
VF-009.expected-outcome: project.json created with correct schema. On open, paths resolve, configs load. State round-trips correctly.

VF-010.NAME: DetectInProject
VF-010.scenario: User opens a project with video, clicks Detect in GUI. No UI freeze.
VF-010.expected-outcome: Worker emits progress signals. After completion, timeline appears. project.json state updated. slides.json valid.

VF-011.NAME: TimelineInteraction
VF-011.scenario: After detection, user clicks slide blocks on timeline, sees subtitle text.
VF-011.expected-outcome: Timeline shows correct number of blocks matching slide count. Clicking each block displays correct subtitle text and timecodes in side panel.

VF-012.NAME: SettingsLLMPrompt
VF-012.scenario: User opens Settings → LLM tab, edits SYSTEM_PROMPT_REPHRASE, saves.
VF-012.expected-outcome: Edited prompt is saved to project.json and visible on reopen. Takes effect on next LLM processing call.

VF-013.NAME: BackendSelection
VF-013.scenario: User opens Settings → GPU/Backend tab, selects a backend.
VF-013.expected-outcome: Available backends are listed with CUDA availability. Selection saved to project config. Next detect run uses selected backend.

VF-014.NAME: MenuBarActions
VF-014.expected-outcome: All menu items present with correct shortcuts (Ctrl+N/O/S/Q). New/Open → file dialogs → project loaded. Close → project unloaded, UI reset. Save → project.json written. Import Video/Subtitles → project paths updated.

VF-015.NAME: ProjectAppSettings
VF-015.scenario: User opens Project Settings and App Settings from Edit menu.
VF-015.expected-outcome: Project Settings: all detection fields editable, saved to project.json. App Settings: LLM/GPU/snap_mode editable, saved to app-config.yaml. New projects created after app settings change inherit updated defaults.

VF-016.NAME: VideoPlaybackSubtitles
VF-016.scenario: User plays video with subtitle overlay in GUI.
VF-016.expected-outcome: Play/pause/stop work. Time counter updates. Seek slider seeks. Volume slider works. Subtitles render over video and sync with playback. No subtitles → clean video without overlay.

VF-017.NAME: TimelineGreenBlueMarkers
VF-017.scenario: User views detected slides as green markers, double-clicks to open image. User adds blue manual marker, snap adjusts it.
VF-017.expected-outcome: Green markers match slide intervals. Double-click opens image in system viewer. Right-click adds blue marker. Smart snap adjusts position per snap_mode. Marker persisted in project.json and restored on reopen.

VF-018.NAME: SmartSnapModes
VF-018.scenario: User places blue marker near a scene boundary with different snap modes.
VF-018.expected-outcome: diff_only: snaps using existing diff_scores. If none available, marker stays at original position. fallback_analyze: snaps using diff_scores if available, otherwise decodes and analyzes. hybrid: snaps using diff_scores, if graph flat runs high-res analysis. Snapped marker reflects actual scene change.

scenarios.scenario-1: detect_slides with video produces slides.json with intervals and images, no transcript.
scenarios.scenario-2: detect_slides with synthetic video returns correct segment count.
scenarios.scenario-3: detect_slides output can be loaded by notes command later.

scenarios.scenario-1: notes command with slides.json + SRT produces cleaned transcript on segments.
scenarios.scenario-2: notes command without subtitles gracefully handles missing cues.
scenarios.scenario-3: notes command with --notes-mode basic uses _basic_cleanup.
scenarios.scenario-4: Notes mode can be changed and re-run without re-detecting slides.

scenarios.scenario-1: roi_tool CLI command registered and shows in help.
scenarios.scenario-2: Missing video raises user-friendly error.
scenarios.scenario-3: Coordinates output format is parseable by --ignore-roi.

scenarios.scenario-1: Create project with video path → project.json exists, contains correct fields.
scenarios.scenario-2: Open existing project.json → loads correct config, resolves paths.
scenarios.scenario-3: Update project state after detect → state.detect_done=true, slides_json set.
scenarios.scenario-4: Project dir missing → raises FileNotFoundError.

scenarios.scenario-1: Main window opens without errors (offscreen).
scenarios.scenario-2: Project toolbar buttons (new/open/save) are clickable.
scenarios.scenario-3: Video file selector opens file dialog.
scenarios.scenario-4: Detect button is disabled when no project is open.

scenarios.scenario-1: Timeline renders correct number of slide blocks matching input data.
scenarios.scenario-2: Clicking a block emits selected_slide_changed signal with correct index.
scenarios.scenario-3: Subtitle panel displays correct text for selected segment.
scenarios.scenario-4: Empty slides list does not crash the widget.

scenarios.scenario-1: Settings dialog opens with correct tab count (≥2).
scenarios.scenario-2: LLM tab shows system prompt in editable text field.
scenarios.scenario-3: Backend tab lists available backends with selection.
scenarios.scenario-4: Save button persists changes to project.json.

scenarios.scenario-1: AppConfigManager loads/saves app-config.yaml correctly.
scenarios.scenario-2: Missing config file returns defaults, does not crash.
scenarios.scenario-3: New project creation inherits app config defaults (LLM, GPU, snap_mode).
scenarios.scenario-4: Config directory created automatically if missing.

scenarios.scenario-1: diff_only with valid diff_scores: snaps to nearest peak within ±5s.
scenarios.scenario-2: diff_only with no diff_scores: returns original timestamp unchanged.
scenarios.scenario-3: fallback_analyze with no diff_scores: decodes window, computes differences, finds boundary.
scenarios.scenario-4: hybrid with flat diff_scores: falls back to high-res analysis.
scenarios.scenario-5: hybrid with clear diff_scores peak: uses diff_only path.

scenarios.scenario-1: Add marker → calls smart_snap → marker stored with original + snapped timestamps.
scenarios.scenario-2: Delete marker → removed from project.json markers list.
scenarios.scenario-3: Load project with existing markers → markers restored and rendered on timeline.
scenarios.scenario-4: Re-snap marker → re-runs snap with current settings, updates position.

scenarios.scenario-1: Dialog opens with current project config values pre-filled.
scenarios.scenario-2: Edit ROI, threshold, fps → OK → values saved to project.json.
scenarios.scenario-3: Cancel → no changes to project.json.
scenarios.scenario-4: Invalid ROI format → error message, not saved.

scenarios.scenario-1: Dialog shows LLM, GPU, Snap, Default Paths tabs.
scenarios.scenario-2: Edit snap_mode → saved to app-config.yaml.
scenarios.scenario-3: Edit GPU backend → saved to app-config.yaml.
scenarios.scenario-4: New project after app settings change inherits new defaults.

scenarios.scenario-1: Video player widget creates without errors (offscreen).
scenarios.scenario-2: Play/pause/stop buttons emit correct signals.
scenarios.scenario-3: Seek slider updates player position.
scenarios.scenario-4: Volume slider adjusts audio output.
scenarios.scenario-5: Time counter shows formatted MM:SS / total.

scenarios.scenario-1: Subtitle file parsed → cues loaded correctly.
scenarios.scenario-2: positionChanged(10.5) → visible text matches cue at that timestamp.
scenarios.scenario-3: No subtitle file → overlay shows nothing (hidden/blank).
scenarios.scenario-4: Between cues → overlay shows nothing.

scenarios.scenario-1: Green markers rendered at correct positions matching slides intervals.
scenarios.scenario-2: Double-click green marker → QDesktopServices.openUrl called with image path.
scenarios.scenario-3: Right-click on timeline → context menu appears with Add Marker option.
scenarios.scenario-4: Blue markers rendered at correct positions.
scenarios.scenario-5: Click marker → emits marker_selected signal with timestamp.
scenarios.scenario-6: Context menu Delete Marker → emits marker_deleted signal.

scenarios.scenario-1: File menu contains all expected items with correct shortcuts.
scenarios.scenario-2: File > Close triggers project_close signal, UI resets.
scenarios.scenario-3: File > Save triggers project_save signal, project.json written.
scenarios.scenario-4: File > Import Video triggers project_import_video signal with new path.
scenarios.scenario-5: Edit menu contains Project Settings and App Settings items.
scenarios.scenario-6: Menu items disabled when no project loaded (Close, Save, Import, Project Settings).

scenarios.scenario-1: DetectWorker runs detect on a project, emits finished signal with slides.json path.
scenarios.scenario-2: Worker emits progress signals during execution.
scenarios.scenario-3: Error signal on missing video file.
scenarios.scenario-4: Worker can be cancelled via requestInterruption.

Gate-Phase-7.goal: detect-slides and notes commands work independently. detect (all-in-one) remains backwards compatible.

Gate-Phase-8.goal: roi-tool command opens window, selects region, prints coordinates.

Gate-Phase-9.goal: Project system: create, open, update, CLI round-trip. project.json schema stable.

Gate-Phase-10.goal: Desktop GUI: main window, timeline, settings, background workers. All tests pass in offscreen mode.

commands.command-1: QT_QPA_PLATFORM=offscreen pytest tests/test_gui_main.py tests/test_gui_timeline.py tests/test_gui_settings.py tests/test_gui_workers.py -v

Gate-Phase-11.goal: Desktop GUI enhancements: menu bar, video player, subtitle overlay, enhanced timeline, project/app settings, app-wide config, smart snap. All new modules tested. Core pipeline unchanged.

commands.command-1: QT_QPA_PLATFORM=offscreen pytest tests/test_gui_menu_bar.py tests/test_gui_video_player.py tests/test_gui_subtitle_overlay.py tests/test_gui_timeline_v2.py tests/test_gui_marker_manager.py tests/test_gui_smart_snap.py tests/test_gui_settings_project.py tests/test_gui_settings_app.py tests/test_gui_app_config.py -v
commands.command-2: pytest tests/ -x --tb=short # all existing tests still pass

Gate-Phase-12.goal: Domain model refactoring: ProjectModel + TimelineModel extracted from MainWindow. 15 model tests pass.

Gate-Phase-14.goal: Debug infrastructure: LogBridge, DebugDock (Ctrl+D), SignalSpy, MCP Server, ActionRegistry. 26 debug tests pass. All 454+ tests pass.

scenarios.scenario-1: Clip generates uid, duration property, contains/overlaps work.
scenarios.scenario-2: SlideClip.to_segment/from_segment round-trip preserves all fields.
scenarios.scenario-3: Track emits clipAdded signal on add_clip, clipRemoved on remove_clip.
scenarios.scenario-4: Track.sort() orders clips by start_sec.
scenarios.scenario-5: Timeline emits durationChanged signal on duration setter.

scenarios.scenario-1: Initial state: not open, timeline is Timeline instance.
scenarios.scenario-2: add_slide creates manual SlideClip, adds to track, emits slidesChanged.
scenarios.scenario-3: delete_slide removes by index, reindexes remaining, emits slidesChanged.
scenarios.scenario-4: close clears all state, projectClosed emitted, slides list empty.
scenarios.scenario-5: set_scores populates ScoreTrack with correct number of clips.

scenarios.scenario-1: Singleton pattern: LogBridge.instance() returns same object.
scenarios.scenario-2: Loguru message captured and emitted via newLog signal with correct level/time/message.
scenarios.scenario-3: recent(n) returns entries with correct fields.

scenarios.scenario-1: Dock created with title "Debug" and 2 tabs (Logs + State).
scenarios.scenario-2: LogPanel.append renders log entry with level prefix.
scenarios.scenario-3: LogPanel filter combo contains ALL, ERROR levels.
scenarios.scenario-4: StatePanel shows tree from Timeline with correct clip count.

scenarios.scenario-1: watch subscribes to named Qt signal on QObject.
scenarios.scenario-2: watch_all discovers and subscribes to signals on Timeline/Track.

scenarios.scenario-1: @mcp_action decorator attaches _mcp_meta with name/desc.
scenarios.scenario-2: ActionRegistry.scan finds decorated methods, skips undecorated.
scenarios.scenario-3: tools() returns MCP descriptors with inputSchema from type hints.
scenarios.scenario-4: call dispatches to bound method with signature-bound args.

scenarios.scenario-1: StatusBarManager.start/update/finish update status bar text.
SubtitleEditorDialog opens with slide info, accepts changes on OK.
TimelineWidget V3 renders slide blocks and emits signals on interaction.
MarkerPanel dialog shows slide list with count.
RoiSelectorDialog uses QRubberBand for rectangle selection.
McpServer starts on port 9812, tools/list returns expected tools.
scenarios.scenario-2: ActionRegistry integration: @mcp_action methods appear in tools/list.

scenarios.scenario-1: Colab notebook loads and imports all required modules.
create → status=queued, trace_id set.
scenarios.scenario-2: update running sets started_at; terminal sets finished_at.
scenarios.scenario-3: wait polls until terminal or timeout.
scenarios.scenario-4: cancel marks non-terminal op cancelled; terminal op unchanged.

scenarios.scenario-1: OperationError carries type/message/stage/recoverable/trace_id/details.
scenarios.scenario-2: to_dict() excludes None fields.
scenarios.scenario-3: full traceback logged but not in JSON response.

scenarios.scenario-1: Destructive op without confirm=true raises ConfirmRequiredError.
scenarios.scenario-2: Non-destructive op proceeds without confirm.
scenarios.scenario-3: VIDEO2PPTX_TEST_MODE=1 still requires explicit confirm for delete/overwrite.

scenarios.scenario-1: write_json_atomic writes valid JSON; old file replaced.
scenarios.scenario-2: No temp file left behind on success.
scenarios.scenario-3: Partial write on exception leaves target intact.

scenarios.scenario-1: Write tool returns {operation_id, status:queued}.
scenarios.scenario-2: OpRunnerThread runs app_service, op→succeeded with result.
scenarios.scenario-3: app_service failure → op→failed with StructuredError, trace_id preserved.
scenarios.scenario-4: wait_operation returns terminal status without fixed sleep.
scenarios.scenario-5: cancel_operation transitions running op→cancelled, worker stops.
scenarios.scenario-6: Concurrent conflicting ops serialized; no concurrent slides.json write.

scenarios.scenario-1: get_ui_state returns button map with visible/enabled/text per spec.
scenarios.scenario-2: get_project includes video/subtitle paths, duration, cue count, slide count, pipeline states, artifact paths, stale flags.
scenarios.scenario-3: get_timeline returns slide/subtitle/score tracks with UID/intervals/manual/image_path.
scenarios.scenario-4: list_artifacts enumerates project files with sizes.

scenarios.scenario-1: Each write tool validates args via JSON schema; int published as integer.
scenarios.scenario-2: slide_index is 1-based in public API; uid preferred.
scenarios.scenario-3: Missing required arg returns schema error, not silent default.
scenarios.scenario-4: app_shutdown(confirm=true) stops workers+MCP+Qt, frees port, exits 0.

scenarios.scenario-1: read_ui_state returns all 7 buttons with visible/enabled/text.
scenarios.scenario-2: busy flag reflects active operation; current_operation set.

scenarios.scenario-1: Valid project → valid=true, empty errors.
scenarios.scenario-2: Interval overlap/gap/negative → error.
scenarios.scenario-3: Double image path prefix (slides/slides/) → error.
scenarios.scenario-4: Slide count mismatch project.json vs slides.json → error.
scenarios.scenario-5: PPTX re-opens via python-pptx; MD has correct Marp slide count.

scenarios.scenario-1: After detect: detect_done=true, align/notes/md/pptx/auto + stale flags set.
scenarios.scenario-2: Re-detect invalidates downstream (stale=true).
scenarios.scenario-3: Auto with no subs: align/notes status=skipped, not succeeded.

scenarios.scenario-1: slide_delete by uid removes correct slide; UIDs of others preserved.
scenarios.scenario-2: slide_index 1-based in public API; off-by-one fixed across paths.
scenarios.scenario-3: GUI/MCP/CLI invoke same canonical command.

scenarios.scenario-1: 5 buttons present: Quick Preview, Detect, Auto Align, Process Notes, Auto.
scenarios.scenario-2: Quick Preview side-effect-free: no slides.json/deck created; scores present.
scenarios.scenario-3: Button enablement reflects project state (no project→disabled; subs+detect→Auto Align enabled).

scenarios.scenario-1: Coordinated choice honors min_duration (no short neighbor created).
scenarios.scenario-2: Idempotent: 2nd run does not drift boundaries further.
scenarios.scenario-3: dry_run returns plan without mutating slides.
scenarios.scenario-4: include_manual=false leaves manual boundaries unchanged.
scenarios.scenario-5: cue-split count after ≤ before; max-overlap assignment.
scenarios.scenario-6: rollback restores visual boundaries from report.

scenarios.scenario-1: run_detect marks downstream stale; no export side-effects.
scenarios.scenario-2: run_auto(full) produces slides.json+deck.md+deck.pptx; auto_done=true only if valid.
scenarios.scenario-3: run_auto(resume) skips non-stale completed stages.
scenarios.scenario-4: Stage failure halts pipeline, keeps good artifacts, returns failing stage.

scenarios.scenario-1: Port 9812 busy → falls back to 9813..9816; .mcp_port updated.
scenarios.scenario-2: Stale .mcp_port detected and replaced.
scenarios.scenario-3: Restart in same process clears registry + stale _running.
scenarios.scenario-4: Bind to 127.0.0.1 only (not 0.0.0.0).

scenarios.scenario-1: Snapshot captures app/ui/project/timeline/artifacts/logs keys.
scenarios.scenario-2: project.json + slides.json copied into snapshot dir when present.
scenarios.scenario-3: before/after snapshots diffable (stable key order).

scenarios.scenario-1: Launches GUI, finds port via .mcp_port (no guessing), initialize+tools/list pass.
scenarios.scenario-2: Before/after snapshots captured per step; project.json/slides.json copied.
scenarios.scenario-3: Synchronization via wait_operation (no arbitrary sleep).
scenarios.scenario-4: HTML+JSON+junit report emitted; defects.json on failure.

scenarios.scenario-E2E-001: App launch: health, initialize, tools/list, idle UI, no startup errors.
scenarios.scenario-E2E-002: project_create: dir+project.json, title updated, Save enabled.
scenarios.scenario-E2E-003: video_import: path recorded, duration>0, Detect/Preview/Auto enabled.
scenarios.scenario-E2E-004: subtitle_import: cue count matches, monotonic, Auto Align disabled until detect.
scenarios.scenario-E2E-005: playback seek/play/pause; subtitle overlay matches cue.
scenarios.scenario-E2E-006: Quick Preview: scores present, no slides.json, idempotent 2nd run.
scenarios.scenario-E2E-007: Detect: slides.json valid, images exist, no exports, Auto Align enabled.
scenarios.scenario-E2E-008: Auto Align dry_run: plan only, project unchanged.
scenarios.scenario-E2E-009: Auto Align apply: count/order preserved, report created, cue-split non-increasing, idempotent.
scenarios.scenario-E2E-010: Process Notes basic: notes_done, cleaned transcript, no exports.
scenarios.scenario-E2E-011: Slide CRUD round-trip via uid; off-by-one fixed; save/open preserves.
scenarios.scenario-E2E-012: Export MD: Marp slide count matches, no slides/slides path, images exist.
scenarios.scenario-E2E-013: Export PPTX: valid zip, re-opens, notes present, unicode preserved.
scenarios.scenario-E2E-015: Auto full on clean project: all stages, auto_done=true, resume no-op, force recompute.
scenarios.scenario-E2E-101: No-subtitle project: Auto skips align/notes (status=skipped), exports created.
scenarios.scenario-E2E-102: Nonexistent video → failed, not hang, not crash.
scenarios.scenario-E2E-104: Re-detect replaces intervals, invalidates downstream, no modal block.
scenarios.scenario-E2E-106: Cancel long op: worker stops, op=cancelled, no partial slides.json as ready.
scenarios.scenario-E2E-108: app_shutdown(confirm=true): clean exit, port freed, code 0.
scenarios.scenario-E2E-109: Busy port 9812 → fallback discovered by runner.

scenarios.scenario-1: docs/architecture.md exists with layers, dependency rules, sequence diagrams, migration table.
TimeInterval(start, end): end > start enforced, duration computed, contains/overlaps methods.
scenarios.scenario-2: TimeInterval(end <= start) raises ValidationError.
scenarios.scenario-3: SlideId: uuid-based, stable across renames.
scenarios.scenario-4: ArtifactRef: normalizes path, prevents double prefix, resolves relative to project dir.
scenarios.scenario-5: PipelineState: valid transitions, terminal states, cannot restart from succeeded without force.

scenarios.scenario-1: add_slide(): stable SlideId, correct index assignment.
scenarios.scenario-2: remove_slide(): other SlideIds preserved, indices recalculated.
scenarios.scenario-3: move_slide(): overlap prevented by domain invariant.
scenarios.scenario-4: replace_detected_slides(): replaces all, invalidates downstream.

scenarios.scenario-1: Save → load round-trip preserves all fields.
scenarios.scenario-2: Atomic write: crash during write leaves previous version intact.
scenarios.scenario-3: Schema migration: v1 project.json upgrades to v2 on load.
scenarios.scenario-4: Loading invalid project.json raises ProjectPersistenceError.

scenarios.scenario-CHAR-001: Direct application call: Detect produces same slides.json as CLI detect.
scenarios.scenario-CHAR-002: MCP detect produces same slides.json as direct call.
scenarios.scenario-CHAR-003: Slide CRUD via MCP matches slide CRUD via GUI.
scenarios.scenario-CHAR-005: Quick Preview is idempotent and creates no slide/export artifacts.
scenarios.scenario-CHAR-006: MCP terminal success implies project, timeline, disk, and UI synchronization.
scenarios.scenario-CHAR-007: Auto Align dry-run is side-effect free; apply preserves invariants and is idempotent.
scenarios.scenario-CHAR-008: UID-based slide CRUD keeps project, timeline, project.json, and slides.json consistent.
scenarios.scenario-CHAR-009: Save/Close/Open preserves normalized project state and disables all project actions while closed.
scenarios.scenario-CHAR-010: MCP Markdown and PPTX exports match source slide/image counts and preserve project identity.
scenarios.scenario-CHAR-011: Video and subtitle import set correct project paths, subtitle clips, and button enablement.
scenarios.scenario-CHAR-012: Process Notes enriches transcript text and sets notes_done.
scenarios.scenario-CHAR-013: Full Auto completes detect+align+notes+export in a single clean project with all artifacts.

scenarios.scenario-1: domain/ does not import application, infrastructure, adapters, PySide6.
scenarios.scenario-2: application/ does not import gui, mcp, cli, PySide6.
scenarios.scenario-3: GUI does not import direct json.load/json.dump from persistence.
scenarios.scenario-4: MCP does not import MainWindow.
